import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:5000',withCredentials:true,// Important for cookies/session
headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// API services for companies
export const companyService={getAllCompanies:()=>api.get('/api/companies'),getCompany:id=>api.get("/api/companies/".concat(id)),getCompanyReports:id=>api.get("/api/companies/".concat(id,"/reports")),getCompanyMarketData:id=>api.get("/api/companies/".concat(id,"/market")),getCompanyShareholders:id=>api.get("/api/companies/".concat(id,"/shareholders")),getCompanyHistoricalData:id=>api.get("/api/companies/".concat(id,"/historical"))};// API services for news
export const newsService={getLatestNews:function(){let count=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:10;return api.get("/api/news?count=".concat(count));},searchCompanyNews:companyName=>api.get("/api/news/search/".concat(companyName))};export default api;
